name: gnome-provider-limits
description: GNOME Shell extension that shows session limits of multiple AI coding providers (Codex, Claude, OpenCode) in the top bar.

scripts.compile:mo: node scripts/compile-mo.mjs src/po/pt_BR.po dist/locale/pt_BR/LC_MESSAGES/gnome-provider-limits.mo && node scripts/compile-mo.mjs src/po/en.po dist/locale/en/LC_MESSAGES/gnome-provider-limits.mo
scripts.copy:assets: cp src/metadata.json dist/metadata.json && cp src/stylesheet.css dist/stylesheet.css && rm -rf dist/icons dist/po dist/schemas dist/src dist/tests && cp -r src/icons dist/icons && mkdir -p dist/schemas && cp src/schemas/gschemas.compiled dist/schemas/gschemas.compiled && cp src/schemas/org.gnome.shell.extensions.gnome-provider-limits.gschema.xml dist/schemas/ && npm run compile:mo
scripts.pack: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run schema:compile && npm run copy:assets && cd dist && zip -r ../dist/gnome-provider-limits@franciscoknebel.com.shell-extension.zip . -x '*.zip' && cd ..
scripts.install:local: npm run pack && gnome-extensions install --force dist/*.zip
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run check:i18n && npm run test
